extensionDescription.message: Control web video speed, window fit, and ultrawide crop with layout-independent physical-key shortcuts.

popupUnavailable.message: ViewTune can't be used in this tab.

popupSiteUnavailable.message: Controls aren't available on this site.

popupUpdateRequired.message: Update required — this tab is running older ViewTune code.

settingsRecordingPrompt.message: Press a key · Esc to cancel

settingsModifierOnly.message: A modifier alone can't be assigned.

settingsReservedModifiers.message: Ctrl, Alt, and Meta combinations aren't available.

settingsShortcutConflict.message: That key is already used by $ACTION$.

contentSiteUnavailable.message: ViewTune controls aren't available on this site.

contentEmbeddedFrameUnsupported.message: Window fit can't safely cover the full tab for an embedded-frame video.

contentWindowUnsupported.message: Window fit can't be applied safely to this player structure.

contentWindowRestoredBroken.message: The video geometry broke, so the original layout was restored.

contentWideMetadataUnavailable.message: The video aspect ratio is unavailable, so zoom wasn't applied.

contentWideAlreadyFit.message: There is no extra space to crop at the current frame ratio.

contentWideUnsupported.message: Video zoom can't be applied safely in this player.

contentWideCanceledGeometry.message: The player size changed, so video zoom was canceled.

contentWindowLayerClosed.message: The screen layer closed, so the original layout was restored.

contentWindowUnstable.message: The video geometry didn't stabilize, so the original layout was restored.

contentWindowConflictingMode.message: Another screen mode started, so window fit was turned off.

contentWindowStructureChanged.message: The player structure changed, so the original layout was restored.

contentNoVideo.message: No controllable video was found on this page.

backgroundNoVideo.message: No controllable video was found in this tab.
